caption: In a professional setting, two men are seated in black chairs against a white backdrop featuring the "UNITED STATES INSTITUTE OF PEACE" logo and text. The man on the left wears a grey blazer over a white button-down shirt and dark trousers, sitting with his hands clasped in his lap. The man on the right is dressed in a dark navy suit, a light blue shirt, and a blue tie, holding a set of papers. A glass coffee table sits in front of them, holding two clear glasses of water. As the scene progresses, the man on the right speaks while looking down at his documents and then slightly toward the other man. The man on the left remains mostly stationary, listening attentively with a neutral expression. The lighting is bright and even, and the camera angle remains fixed throughout the sequence.
